# clo_compute_keypairs (Data Source)

Fetches the list of keypairs in the project

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "clo_compute_keypairs" "all" {
  project_id = "1e8ff0f7-0b8c-4ec5-a0a4-e30cea0db287"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) ID of the project that owns keypairs

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `result` (List of Object) The object that holds the results (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--result))

<a id="nestedatt--result"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result`

Read-Only:

- `created_in` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `public_key` (String)
